vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, high-end technical authority

spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: gap-4 or gap-6 for tight widget spacing

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-black transition-colors rounded-md px-5 py-2.5 font-semibold text-sm shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-md px-5 py-2.5 font-semibold text-sm shadow-sm
buttons.destructive: bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors rounded-md px-5 py-2.5 font-semibold text-sm shadow-sm
buttons.accent: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors rounded-md px-5 py-2.5 font-semibold text-sm shadow-sm

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer

tables.style: Use Shadcn Table. Dense rows, 1px bottom borders, sticky headers. Subdued header text (tiny style), strong values.

forms.style: Shadcn Form components. Use ring-2 ring-blue-600 ring-offset-2 for focus. Crisp borders, bold labels.

logos.description: Autoniv Brand Logo (Black icon + text on white background)

avatars.description: Female professional avatar in white/blue checked shirt

backgrounds.description: Abstract white geometric minimal background for login page

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React for all standard icons. Ensure consistent stroke widths (usually 1.5 or 2). For voice specific icons, rely on clear visual metaphors (mic, wave, play).

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Minimal animations. Fast state transitions (150ms). Use subtle hover lifts on interactive cards and agent lists.
accessibility_and_motion.accessibility: High contrast text required. All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based). Provide aria-labels for icon-only buttons (e.g., playback controls).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) design rules. The UI should feel objective, structured, and highly functional.
Do NOT use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Ensure 'Outfit' is imported/used for headings, and 'Manrope' for body text.
Design the Admin and User dashboards using a 'Control Room Grid' strategy: dense, modular widgets that maximize data visibility with minimal whitespace gaps.
Use the provided Autoniv logo URL for branding in the app header, sidebar, and login screens.
Apply the abstract geometric background URL to the login view to convey a premium, modern AI aesthetic.
Ensure real-time elements (like call status or agent health) use sharp, unambiguous indicators (e.g., green dot for live, red for error).
Use standard HTML layouts combined with customized Shadcn components. Limit border-radius to 8px max to maintain a crisp technical aesthetic.
Always apply a `data-testid` to interactive elements such as buttons, form inputs, table rows, and tab triggers.
